positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring an astronaut exploring a bioluminescent alien jungle at twilight. The astronaut is rendered with clean lines and a distinct, rounded silhouette, holding a glowing plant sample. The background is filled with deep indigo and turquoise bioluminescent flora, geometric alien ruins visible through the mist, and soft particulate light sources. Use a synthwave and vaporwave aesthetic mixed with sci-fi art; high contrast, limited color palette (cyan, magenta, electric blue, black). Perfect for screen printing, seamless repeat potential, vector art feel. Central composition, minimalist detailing, dramatic lighting.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, low-detail, text, watermark, signature, out of focus, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoon, photorealistic, messy, jagged lines
